headline: PayPal Holdings: Q3 Earnings Insights
summary:
Shares of PayPal Holdings (NASDAQ:PYPL) decreased 5.75% in after-market trading after the company reported Q3 results.

Quarterly Results

Earnings per share increased 75.41% year over year to $1.07, which beat the estimate of $0.94.

headline: Mondelez International: Q3 Earnings Insights
summary:
Shares of Mondelez International (NASDAQ:MDLZ) fell 1.44% in after-market trading after the company reported Q3 results.

Quarterly Results
